chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 406 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2259/2019. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.2260/2019. 19.09.2025 This matter is pending since 2019 without any progress and even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 02.12.2019, the following order was passed: “02.12.2019: Mr. Ayaz Samejo, advocate present and submits that Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, advocate will proceed with the instant matter on behalf of the applicant, who is reportedly out of station and requests for adjournment. Adjourned.” On 30.11.2020, the following order was passed: “30-11-2020: Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of applicant, which is taken on record. He requests for time to prepare the case. Time is grnated. Adjourned.” Today, Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto, advocate is present and merely seeks time yet again to file Vakalatnama. It appears that SRB is not interested in the proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
